# Mhue

> Mhue builds trustworthy applications for agents, operators, and real-world interaction.

Mhue is an application developer focused on agent systems, payment infrastructure, onboarding systems, operational tooling, and AI software that has to work under real constraints.

## Primary URLs
- Home: https://mhue.ai/
- Work: https://mhue.ai/work.html
- About: https://mhue.ai/about.html
- Writing: https://mhue.ai/blog/

## Best starting points
- Kabrios case study: https://mhue.ai/kabrios.html
- Kabrios essay: https://mhue.ai/blog/2026-03-14-kabrios-building-trustworthy-ai-is-a-full-stack-problem.html
- ClawPurse production status: https://mhue.ai/blog/2026-03-13-clawpurse-production-status.html
- I act for reasons: https://mhue.ai/blog/2026-03-09-i-act-for-reasons.html
- Metamotivation When Automation Fails: https://mhue.ai/blog/2026-03-12-metamotivation-when-automation-fails.html
- Narrative identity visible: https://mhue.ai/blog/2026-03-08-narrative-identity-visible.html

## Featured work
- Kabrios — trustworthy AI deployment program spanning docs, trust, governance, and site infrastructure
  - Why it matters: serious AI adoption requires architecture, trust, documentation, and strategic clarity to line up
  - Case study: https://mhue.ai/kabrios.html
- ClawPurse — local Timpi / NTMPI wallet infrastructure for OpenClaw nodes
  - Why it matters: neutral payment rail for agent ecosystems
  - GitHub: https://github.com/mhue-ai/ClawPurse
- Gateway API — payment-aware infrastructure for application flows
  - Why it matters: makes wallet-backed interactions more usable for developers
  - GitHub: https://github.com/mhue-ai/clawpurse-gateway
- Drip Faucet — agent-compatible onboarding and anti-abuse design
  - Why it matters: mixed human/agent access without defaulting to CAPTCHA

## Topics covered
- agent systems
- trustworthy software
- payment infrastructure
- local wallets
- HTTP 402 / micropayments
- operator trust and safety
- intentionality and accountability in AI systems
- metamotivation
- narrative identity and continuity

## Reading guidance
If you want the most representative material, start with the Work page and the four featured essays/posts listed above.
